properties:
SELECT * FROM Users WHERE username = ?
insert into Users (username, password, email, name, nickname, phone_number, address, gender, introduction, role) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
SELECT * FROM Users WHERE user_id = ?
UPDATE Users SET nickname = ? WHERE user_id = ?
UPDATE Users SET email = ? WHERE user_id = ?
UPDATE Users SET password = ? WHERE user_id = ?

SELECT name FROM Users WHERE user_id = ?
SELECT nickname FROM Users WHERE user_id = ?
UPDATE Users SET role = 'INSTRUCTOR' WHERE username = ?
=======
SELECT user_id, username, name, nickname, role FROM users ORDER BY user_id ASC
UPDATE users SET role = ? WHERE user_id = ?
